pi_items.source: Code inspection: setup_task.sh line 84 creates provider with identifier 'PROV-TEMP' via OpenMRS API. export_result.sh line 42 queries for this identifier.
Code inspection: setup_task.sh lines 62-63 create Person with givenName='Temporary', familyName='Provider'. OpenMRS naming convention concatenates these as 'Temporary Provider'.
task.json description line 3 explicitly specifies 'Contract Ended' as retirement reason. verifier.py line 64-65 verifies this exact reason.
task.json description mentions URL. setup_task.sh line 111 launches browser to this URL. Web search confirms /openmrs/admin is standard OpenMRS admin interface path.

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on Bahmni/OpenMRS, a real open-source healthcare system. The provider data is synthetically created for the benchmark task (not real patient data). The task requires retiring a provider record via OpenMRS API using the target identifier PROV-TEMP, setting the retirement reason to 'Contract Ended'. OpenMRS implements the Retireable interface for providers, with retirement tracked via 'retired' boolean and 'retireReason' text fields. The system uses administrator credentials (username: superman) for API access, and the admin interface is accessible at the standard path https://localhost/openmrs/admin.
